insight: Your strength is trending upward — your Arms session on Apr 23 hit 5,665 kg total volume, up 15.6% from your Apr 15 session at 4,892 kg, a solid progression. On the cardio side, you're pushing your aerobic ceiling hard: both your 7 km run and your 11.72 km trail run averaged over 175 bpm, which suggests you're training at high intensity — consider adding a Zone 2 easy run this week to aid recovery. Consistency is your strongest asset right now, with strength and cardio sessions running back-to-back — just make sure you're getting enough sleep to let it all compound.
